# Certificates API

- csr.yaml 생성
    
    ```bash
    apiVersion: certificates.k8s.io/v1
    kind: CertificateSigningRequest
    metadata:
      name: akshay
    spec:
      request: 
      # request에 base64 인코딩된 csr파일을 붙여넣기
      signerName: kubernetes.io/kube-apiserver-client
      usages:
      - client auth
    ```
    

```bash
kubectl certificate approve <이름>
kubectl certificate deny <이름>
```
